title: Airfield Automated System (AFAS) Technical Support Services
name: Airfield Automated System (AFAS) Technical Support Services
statement_of_work: Combined Synopsis/Solicitation In Accordance With (IAW) RFO 12.202(b) Solicitation Number: FA810026QB001 Airfield Automation System (AFAS) Technical Support Services The Air Force Sustainment Center’s Enterprise/Specialized Contracting Branch (AFSC/PZIEC, 7858 5th Street Building 3, Tinker AFB OK 73145-9125) intends to award a Firm Fixed Price (FFP) contract for the AFAS Technical Support Services.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the Airfield Automated System (AFAS) Technical Support Services solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
dept: DEPT OF DEFENSE.DEPT OF THE AIR FORCE.AIR FORCE MATERIEL COMMAND.AIR FORCE SUSTAINMENT CENTER.FA8100 AFSC PZIEC
description: Combined Synopsis/Solicitation In Accordance With (IAW) RFO 12.202(b) Solicitation Number: FA810026QB001 Airfield Automation System (AFAS) Technical Support Services The Air Force Sustainment Center’s Enterprise/Specialized Contracting Branch (AFSC/PZIEC, 7858 5th Street Building 3, Tinker AFB OK 73145-9125) intends to award a Firm Fixed Price (FFP) contract for the AFAS Technical Support Services.
